tickets.name: Balkrushna Naik
tickets.solution:
Troubleshooting network issues:
  1. Restart your router/modem (unplug 30 sec).
  2. Forget and reconnect to the Wi-Fi network.
  3. Check VPN status — disconnect and reconnect.
  4. Run: ipconfig /release && ipconfig /renew (Windows).
  5. If persistent, escalate to the Network team with your IP address.

tickets.name: Kenisha Mehta
tickets.solution:
Data backup and recovery:
  1. Check Recycle Bin / Trash first.
  2. Search OneDrive/SharePoint version history.
  3. Contact IT immediately — do NOT write new data to the drive.
  4. IT will attempt shadow-copy restore (up to 30 days back).
  5. For critical data loss, a forensic recovery may be initiated.
